channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 105 Linthorpe Road N16 pallet, 15th April
item.description:
Wooden pallets left outside 105 Linthorpe Road N16 needs to be moved,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stamford Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, 15th April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 15/04/26 16:05 Fly-tipping Lat/Long - 51.4256121, -0.0312132 what3words - float.slips.minute Nearest address - 28 Montana Gardens, Lower Sydenham, London, SE26 5BF Matress Reference - 5492390 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 15/04/2026 16:05 Matress
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadowview Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large number of wooden pallets on the pavement. There are more further down Margaret Road, 15th April
item.description:
Since the photo taken, some have fallen over and blocking the pavement. There are items left here almost every single day.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Margaret Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: It is behind the black gate to the side of the main building (the gate is permanently open which seems to be why people are leaving furniture here), 15th April
item.description:
Fly tipping (furniture)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Graffiti, 15th April
item.description:
Graffiti at Green Dragon Court

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 282-302, Borough High Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins used on a public road to restrict parking access, 15th April
item.description:
Bins are regularly placed on the public road, reducing space for vehicles to pull in safely and causing bottlenecks, congestion, and potential safety risks. This has at times led to tension between drivers and has been ongoing for over 12 months
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Birdbrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 115 Godstow Road: beds, etc., 15th April
item.description:
Been here for approximately two weeks. Lorry will be needed to remove.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brondesbury villas - Kilburn high road to 90 both sides, 15th April
item.description:
Absolutely covered in rubbish - see photos

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Second cul de sac down from Harrow Manorway (evens side): bags of rubbish, etc., 15th April
item.description:
Bags of rubbish are in raisedbed and other items, possibly from a car, are at front of raisedbed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover missing, 15th April
item.description:
My child has just walked home from school and there is a manhole cover missing and exposing a drain hole access, which other children are stupidly climbing down. Obviously it is dangerous and should be dealt with asap. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobham Close, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several pot holes, 15th April
item.description:
This has been reported as fixed ref 9291146 one pothole has had some tarmac put in it, but the rest of the potholes have not been touched and need attention. The whole road needs resurfacing. This is not fixed and needs further investigations.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Windermere Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 10 Boxgrove Road: two mattresses., 15th April
item.description:
Usual dumping place near to tree stump.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Boxgrove Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ground nesting wasps causing problems in playground, 15th April
item.description:
Ground nesting wasps have nests in both grass verges next to the playground and are causing issues with food /stinging children. This is a busy school run route and we have had problems with wasps here before with children being stung.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac lifting causing trip hazzard, 15th April
item.description:
All tarmac in the park is lifting is is a bad trip hazards especially in a kids park . It’s been there for over a year. Next to the wooden fence around the park and around the play toys in the park . My kid hurt himself every time we come in the park.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lea Bridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 15th April
item.description:
There are food packaging, cans, plastic bottles, paper and plastic bags on the road and pavement on Tabard Street. It has been on there for two days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste fly tipping, 15th April
item.description:
Large pile of garden waste and associated detritus fly tipped wholesale from the road. Probably of commercial origin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brampton Road, Bexleyheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various bits of garden rubbish dumped in Burtwell Lane at the Clive Road entrance, 15th April
item.description:
Burtwell Lane at the Clive Road entrance various bits of garden rubbish dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Burtwell Lane, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light twisted, 15th April
item.description:
Traffic light twisted again after fix something permanent needs to be done

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norman Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Flytipped broken drawer unit Evergreen Close, 15th April
item.description:
At the far end of Evergreen Close someone has dumped broken pieces of drawer furniture. Just beyond grass area righthand side on the footpath. Please can you remove it. Thankyou
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evergreen Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous lack of railing, 15th April
item.description:
Been missing probably a year. Smashed by a car. The next car smashes a pedestrian.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Skinner Street, Clerkenwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
